body: Hi {business_name} - William from Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). People can't book you online. I'll set up free 24/7 booking for you this week. Interested? Text YES or call. Reply STOP to opt out.
notes: PHASE 1 OPTIMIZATION: Free setup (no fake social proof)
optimization_rationale: This week = urgency without scarcity lie
Clear value: never miss appointment again

variants.body: {business_name} owner: Losing appointments because people can't book online? I'll connect you to a free scheduling system today. William, Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.

Hi {business_name} - most customers expect online booking. I'll set yours up for free (takes 10 minutes). No cost. William from Marceau Solutions (239) 398-5676. Want it? Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.
